changelog:
📢 1.0.0-desktop: Update UI and shortcut, fixed minor issues.

[🟢=New Feature, 🟠=Feature Update, 🟣=Fix]

Here are some improvements from the last version of Deskplay:

🟠 Update: Made UI adjustments. Game cover with rounded corners, elevation/shadow effect, 1-pixel outline for black covers against a black background.
🟠 Update: Updated Alt+W shortcut behaviour for custom launcher mode. Now the shorcut brings the custom launcher app to the foreground. This is useful for exiting games in emulators.
🟣 Fix: Fixed some minor issues.

I hope you enjoy Deskplay. Keep gaming.
